CustomField.description: Running count of walk-in places consumed from this session's reserve pool. Design §2.3: incremented ONLY inside the session's SELECT ... FOR UPDATE lock by VS_BookingService.book() (VS-09, D-019/D-020) — never by a rollup or trigger. Defaults to 0 on creation; no automation is built in this metadata-only ticket.
CustomField.label: Walk-In Used Count
